_meta.title: T2V + Video Edit Pipeline (Kling V3 → O3 Edit)
_meta.description: Generate video from text with Kling V3.0, then apply scene transformation with Kling O3 Video Edit. Demonstrates two-stage video generation with API Partner Nodes.
_meta.author: ComfyUI Learning PostGrad#8

inputs.prompt: A majestic red lobster chef in a traditional Japanese kitchen, skillfully preparing sushi with precise knife movements. Steam rises from a pot in the background. Warm golden lighting, cinematic composition.

_meta.title: Stage 1: Kling V3.0 Text-to-Video
_meta.note: Generates base video from text prompt. 5s, 16:9, std mode for cost efficiency.

_meta.title: Load Generated Video
_meta.note: Extracts frames from Stage 1 output for display/processing

inputs.prompt: Transform the kitchen into an underwater coral reef palace. The lobster chef cooks surrounded by colorful tropical fish and bioluminescent coral.

_meta.title: Stage 2: Kling O3 Video Edit
_meta.note: Applies scene transformation while preserving motion and composition. O3 model for best quality editing.
